creator: kkennawa@physics.adelaide.edu.au
text:
On Wed, 17 Mar 1999 tarkhil@asteroid.svib.ru wrote:

> purts/web/wml should be upgraded to 1.6.8 and un-broken
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Manually unbroke wml, attempt to build and install; also take a look 
> at homepage

Can you provide patches to do this? the reason it's still marked BROKEN is
because no-one's been concerned enough to spend the time to fix the problems.
Fixing this yourself would be a good way to contribute.

Kris
